items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Tottenham join Arsenal, Cit...
items.summary: Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali now has Tottenham Hotspur on his trail. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Transfer Big Board: Best players in each position ...
items.summary: The transfer window is open in Premier League and will be soon in Europe, so who is available? It's our big board!

items.title: ⚽ Red Sox host 'Scotland Day' amid World Cup
items.summary: The Tartan Army -- Scotland's supporters organization -- led a fan march from Evans Way Park to the ballpark, bagpipe music and all.

items.title: Sources: Sorsby set to enter supplemental draft
items.summary: Amid legal wrangling over his NCAA eligibility, Texas Tech transfer quarterback Brendan Sorsby plans to apply for the NFL's supplemental draft.

items.title: Dolan asked for 10-week sacrifice in April speech
items.summary: Knicks owner James Dolan delivered an impassioned speech in front of his team before the playoffs, urging the players to "leave nothing on the table" in the pursuit of a title.

items.title: 'Repressed' Iran forced to leave U.S. after game
items.summary: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei called his team perhaps the "most repressed team in the whole World Cup," after he said Iran have been forced to leave Los Angeles and return to their base camp in Tijuana, Mexico, immediately following their opening match.

items.title: Cubs' Crow-Armstrong hits for first cycle of 2026
items.summary: Cubs center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong became the first player in the majors to hit for the cycle this season.

items.title: MLB cautions against writing on Pride Night hats
items.summary: Major League Baseball on Monday decried the use of personal writings on any team-issued Pride Night hats after members of the San Francisco Giants had Bible verses etched into their caps during Friday's loss to the Chicago Cubs.

items.title: Megatron sees record falling, Nacua as top threat
items.summary: Calvin Johnson doesn't expect his single-season NFL record for receiving yards to last much longer. And if he had to guess, Rams star Puka Nacua will be the one to break it.

items.title: UFC's Hokit disparages Michelle Obama at WH
items.summary: UFC fighter Josh Hokit targeted Michelle Obama during his postfight comments at Sunday's UFC White House event, saying the former First Lady "is a man."
